title: The Ruins Point Toward the Bell
description: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this scene centers on Luffy, Nico Robin, Eneru, Nola, Enel. Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What Happened to this World Back then...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, the gold you seek is gone.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You are a few years too late.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So, you took the Golden Bell, too!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Very interesting...! What did you learn

summary: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
